creator: alleni@me.com
text:
During install, it fails when validating the checksum of the first installation file (base.txz).  I tried both the CD and DVD ISO images.  I tried installing onto ZFS file system and UFS.  All resulted in exactly the same error.

These install attempts were to USB thumb drive.

Looking through the bug history, I was not able to locate this bug.

Fix: 

No workaround was found.
How-To-Repeat: It occurs during every installation attempt.
